name: Rice-Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Can RTel Tomatoes and Chilies with Juice
4 medium Green peppers, tops removed and halved lengthwise
10 oz Can RTel Diced tomatoes with Chilies and Juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot or Dutch oven, cook the ground beef, onion, green pepper, and garlic until the beef is browned. Drain excess fat.
2. Add the RTel tomatoes with chilies, diced tomatoes with juice, water, and cumin to the pot. Simmer, uncovered for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in the instant rice and simmer, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes. Remove from heat and cover; let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Place the halved green peppers (tops removed) in a large pan of boiling water and boil for 4 minutes. Drain and set aside.
5. Stuff the peppers with the meat mixture. Place any remaining meat mixture on top of the stuffed peppers, pressing gently.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
7. In a saucepan, heat the cheese sauce ingredients until the cheese is melted. Serve over the peppers.
